entities.name: BIOENERGY
entities.description: Energy derived from biological sources such as agriculture biomass

entities.name: FOOD
entities.description: Agricultural products intended for human consumption

entities.name: CROP BIOMASS
entities.description: Plant material, including grain and other parts, used as raw material for energy production

entities.name: BIOENERGY PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of converting biomass into energy

entities.name: FOOD SUPPLIES
entities.description: The available quantity of food for human consumption

entities.name: FEED SUPPLIES
entities.description: The available quantity of food for livestock

entities.name: PLANT RESIDUES
entities.description: Leftover plant materials that contribute to soil health

entities.name: SOIL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to support plant growth and crop yields

entities.name: SOIL STRUCTURE
entities.description: The arrangement of soil particles and pores

entities.name: EROSION
entities.description: The process of wearing away the topsoil

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific study aimed at improving agricultural productivity and sustainability

entities.name: BIOMASS TRAITS
entities.description: Physical or genetic characteristics of plants that affect biomass yield

entities.name: DUAL-PURPOSE FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown for both food production and energy biomass

entities.name: BIOMASS CROPS
entities.description: Crops specifically developed for energy production

entities.name: MARGINAL LANDS
entities.description: Land with low productivity or poor soil quality

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LIVESTOCK MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems for managing livestock that minimize environmental impact

entities.name: BIOMASS RESIDUALS
entities.description: Leftover biomass used as animal feed

entities.name: FEEDS
entities.description: Food provided to livestock

entities.name: CROP RESIDUES
entities.description: Plant material remaining in the field after harvest

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural production that maintains ecological balance and productivity

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The organized approach to agricultural production in a specific area

entities.name: LOW-YIELD RAINFED SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems dependent on rainfall with low productivity levels

entities.name: BIOFUEL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of liquid fuels from biological materials

entities.name: ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: The development and expansion of plant root systems

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: The organic component of soil derived from decomposed plant and animal matter

entities.name: ENERGY EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of energy output to energy input in biomass crops

entities.name: RENEWABLE ENERGY SOURCES
entities.description: Energy sources that are naturally replenished

entities.name: NET CARBON EMISSIONS
entities.description: The total amount of carbon released into the atmosphere minus the amount absorbed
